description: Indicates when childcare is available during this sub event. Both `start` and `end` must be provided together.

allOf.description: The time at which childcare becomes available, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be earlier than the time portion of `startDate`.
The time at which childcare ends, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be later than the time portion of `endDate`.
